required_files.rationale: Contains the kube-proxy nftables sync logic that logs 'Failed to list existing sets' and 'nftables sync failed'. The error wrapping originates here.
The underlying knftables library that crashes with segfault when encountering sets with udata. Fix bumps this dependency.

sufficient_files.rationale: Dependency version bump for knftables is part of the fix.
Updated checksums for the dependency bump.

error_chain: proxier.go calls knftables to list existing nft sets
knftables library invokes nft CLI which segfaults on sets with udata
knftables returns error with 'segmentation fault' detail
proxier.go wraps as 'Failed to list existing sets' and logs
Outer sync loop logs 'nftables sync failed' and retries
trigger_conditions: Host has nftables >= 1.1.3 which creates sets with udata
Another process (firewalld, nftables rules) created sets with udata in the same namespace
kube-proxy is configured to use nftables mode
